steps.title: Identify the announcement and its elaboration
steps.content: The first sentence makes a general claim—that Johnson's style underwent an “abrupt transformation”—without specifying what changed. The underlined sentence immediately follows, positioned to provide this explanation.

steps.title: Match the function to the choices
steps.content:
The underlined sentence elaborates on the transformation claim by specifying what changed: Johnson moved from expressionist landscapes to bold portraits of Black Americans.

The other options misidentify the content:
  • B focuses on travels rather than artistic change
  • C mischaracterizes both the underlined sentence and the following sentence
  • D claims the underlined sentence questions rather than develops the claim


A is correct.
